title: Toms_Simple_Storage_in_TFC
description: A compat mod of Tom's Simple Storage for tfc
body:
A compat mod of [Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) for [TFC](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft).

Basically, this mod adds several recipes and a Crate now.
The Crate can store 27 "Huge" tag items.
You can't open the Crate by just right click, use it by hopper or a TSS terminal storage
